sources.citation: Niehorster, L. — German 6th Army order of battle, 19 Nov 1942
Glantz, D. & House, J. — Stalingrad trilogy (To the Gates of Stalingrad; Armageddon in Stalingrad; Endgame at Stalingrad), 2009–2014

de-h-pzk-14.notes: Pilot coverage: Case Blue to the surrender. The reformed XIV. Panzerkorps (Italy 1943) is a separate incarnation, not yet authored.

ro-armee-3.notes: Axis-allied army scaffold for the Eastern sim: held the Don bend sector north of Stalingrad (Uranus broke through here, 19 Nov 1942). Divisional OOB not yet ingested.
